meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Project Abandonment
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn to build high-converting user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code to ensure your SaaS product retains paying users.
content.answer_block: Project abandonment stems from a lack of user momentum. By implementing an automated, data-driven onboarding flow, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment instantly. Use Antigravity to scaffold your state machine and Claude Code to iterate on the friction points, transforming passive trial users into long-term, high-value subscribers.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with half-baked MVPs that never reached product-market fit because the founders couldn't guide their users through the door. You’ve spent weeks in the code, but if your users don't see the value proposition within 60 seconds of signing up, your project isn't just unfinished—it's effectively dead.

True velocity isn't about how fast you write code; it’s about how fast your users reach the 'Aha!' moment. By treating onboarding as a core product feature rather than an afterthought, you eliminate the mental friction that kills growth. It’s time to move from aimless building to systematic revenue generation.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single action that correlates with long-term retention. Map this to the first 3 interactions your user must have.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current SaaS core value proposition and generate a 3-step user onboarding checklist that guides a new user to the primary 'Aha!' moment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'analyze user journey and identify primary conversion trigger'

steps.title: State-Machine Onboarding Logic
steps.description: Implement a robust state machine to track user progress through onboarding to prevent state corruption.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine schema for user onboarding in TypeScript, supporting states: 'welcome', 'data_entry', 'integration', 'completed'.

steps.title: Automated Friction Reduction
steps.description: Reduce user input requirements by implementing intelligent defaults based on early user signals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a utility function that predicts user preferences based on initial registration data to pre-fill onboarding forms.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/utils/onboarding.ts --apply 'implement predictive form pre-filling'

steps.title: Progressive Disclosure Implementation
steps.description: Build an interface that hides complex features until the user has successfully completed the basic onboarding steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the UI components to use progressive disclosure, showing only essential onboarding elements based on current state.

steps.title: Analytics Integration for Velocity
steps.description: Instrument the onboarding flow to track drop-off rates at every step of the funnel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add telemetry hooks to the onboarding state machine to log user progress to Segment or PostHog.

pro_tips: Never ask for a credit card until the user has successfully completed the 'Aha!' moment.
Use 'skeleton screens' during initial data loading to maintain the illusion of instant speed.
Implement a 'skip' button for power users; forcing onboarding on experienced users is a major conversion killer.
Trigger an automated email sequence based on specific onboarding drop-off states, not just time-based intervals.
A/B test your first onboarding input field; changing one word can often improve completion rates by 15%.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a cohort of 10 users through the process, and analyze the drop-off data using your new telemetry hooks.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in isolation and start shipping products that users actually understand. You have the tools to turn your MVP into a revenue-generating machine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
